name: Creole Mustard Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 T Green onions, sliced into 1/4-inch pieces
1 T Crushed garlic packed in oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the mayonnaise and mustard (either Creole-style or Dijon).
2. Add yellow mustard, horseradish, cider vinegar, and Worcestershire sauce to the mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk red wine vinegar, water, cayenne pepper, salt, green onions, crushed garlic, chopped green pepper, celery, and onion until well combined.
4. Gradually combine the two mixtures until fully incorporated.
5. Serve with Planet Hollywood Chicken.
